fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Filesystem path for the source input or sink output, resolved relative to the run data directory.
fields.label: Path
fields.name: path

fields.description: Sink name for non-conformant rows, or 'discard' for explicit drop
fields.label: On Validation Failure
fields.name: on_validation_failure

fields.description: Pipeline field name that receives each emitted text line.
fields.label: Column
fields.name: column

fields.description: Text encoding used to decode the input file.
fields.label: Encoding
fields.name: encoding

fields.description: Whether to trim leading and trailing whitespace from each line.
fields.label: Strip Whitespace
fields.name: strip_whitespace

fields.description: Whether to drop blank lines after optional whitespace trimming.
fields.label: Skip Blank Lines
fields.name: skip_blank_lines
